objective: Review the implementation plan for CART-S02-T02: add a read-only carto stats CLI command that loads the graph, calls graphStats(), and prints pluralised node/edge counts.
key_changes: Plan correctly scopes change to src/cli.ts only — no graph.ts modifications, no data model changes, no persistence changes
graphStats dependency on T01 is resolved — function exists and is exported in graph.ts with test coverage
Pluralisation logic (two independent ternaries) stays in cli.ts and does not leak into pure graph.ts module
Code snippet produces correct output format matching acceptance criteria: '2 nodes, 1 edge'
Security surface negligible: read-only command, no user input, no filesystem writes, no shell/eval
All project conventions satisfied: ESM .js imports, chalk.green for success, const/arrow functions, strict mode preserved
load() empty-graph default correctly leveraged for missing graph file case (prints '0 nodes, 0 edges')
No new automated tests planned — acceptable for I/O thin shell; graphStats pure logic covered by T01
Manual smoke tests cover three cases: empty graph (0/0), singular (1/0), plural (3/1)
Advisory: routing.md should be updated after implementation to document the stats command
CART-B01 save() ordering guard not relevant — stats command is read-only, no save() call
